operator: Parking Bern (city-wide aggregator covering multiple operators)

endpoints.response_shape: <parkdata updated="DD.MM.YYYY HH:MM:SS"> containing <parking ... /> entries; each entry's data is in attributes

fields.updated: feed timestamp on the root <parkdata> element, format "DD.MM.YYYY HH:MM:SS" (Europe/Zurich)
fields.name: parking identifier — usually the code (e.g. "P01", "P+R"), but a few entries use the long name instead (e.g. "Kurzparking Bahnhof", "City West Parking Mu")
fields.spacecount: currently usable total capacity (may be lower than structural capacity; "-1" indicates closed / unknown)
fields.open: opening time "HH:MM"; "00:00" together with close="00:00" indicates 24h or unspecified

endpoints.notes: The feed currently returns 12 entries; this catalog lists the 10 numbered parkings. The two extras ("Kurzparking Bahnhof", "City West Parking Mu") are sub-facilities of P01 and P04 respectively. Identifier inconsistency: most entries are coded (P01–P10, P+R) but two use long names.

parkings.name: Parkplatz BERNEXPO
parkings.notes: Not listed on the parking-bern.ch homepage; address and capacity unavailable. The XML feed reports spacecount="-1" (closed / unknown sentinel).
